flow 1: home -> accesso al menu a fondo -> sezione di monitoraggio -> note -> ritorno alla home
the diagram models a sequence of actions and decisions for a user interacting with a home page.
the user accesses the menu at the bottom, which leads to a monitoring section.
if the user chooses to monitor, they are presented with a note.
if they choose not to monitor, they are returned to the home page.
the diagram does not show any loops or repeated behavior.
